seo.title: Hair Salon Review Management Software | ReviewFlo
seo.description: Get more Google reviews for your hair salon. Route unhappy clients to private feedback before it hits Google. Free forever, no credit card required.

hero.heading: Review Management Built for Hair Salons
hero.subheading: A great appointment doesn’t always turn into a Google review. ReviewFlo helps you follow up after the visit, without awkward asks.

painPoints.sectionHeading: The Review Problem Every Hair Salon Faces

items.heading: Happy clients leave glowing, then forget
items.body: They’re thinking about dinner plans and their next appointment, not reviews.

items.heading: Color and cut issues show up publicly
items.body: If someone feels disappointed, they’ll post before they reach out.

items.heading: Stylists don’t want to ask in the chair
items.body: It can feel salesy, especially with new clients.

howItWorks.sectionHeading: How ReviewFlo Works for Hair Salons

steps.title: Step 1 — Send the link after the appointment
steps.body: Text or email a ReviewFlo link after they check out.

steps.title: Step 2 — 1–4 stars goes to you privately
steps.body: If they’re unhappy, they message you instead of posting publicly.

steps.title: Step 3 — 5-star clients go straight to Google
steps.body: If they’re happy, they’re guided to leave a Google review.

items.heading: Protects your stylist’s reputation
items.body: Private feedback gives you a chance to fix issues before they go public.

items.heading: Keeps requests consistent
items.body: Use the same link after every appointment, across your whole team.

items.heading: Fits a front-desk checkout flow
items.body: Send the request right after the service, while it’s fresh.

items.heading: $270/month cheaper than Podium
items.body: Podium is $289/month. ReviewFlo Pro is $19/month, and there’s a free plan.

items.q: Will clients leave reviews for hair appointments?
items.a: Yes, especially when you ask right after the appointment.

items.q: What if someone is unhappy with their hair?
items.a: They rate 1–4 stars and send you a private message instead of going to Google.

items.q: Do we need a booking system integration?
items.a: No. You can start by sending requests manually by text or email.

items.q: How is this different from Podium?
items.a: Same core flow for review requests and private feedback. ReviewFlo is priced for small salons.

items.q: Can I use this across multiple stylists?
items.a: Yes. Start with one link for the salon and scale as you grow.

finalCta.heading: Start Getting More Hair Salon Reviews Today
finalCta.subheading: Free forever. No credit card. Your first request goes out in under 5 minutes.
